summary:
\boxed{A}

We are asked only to summarize the agent’s reasoning — specifically focusing on clinically relevant points about easing the financial burden of colonoscopy.

Final summary:

[SUMMARIZED REASONING]  
Fecal immunological testing (FIT) eliminates costly prerequisites like bowel prep and fasting, resulting in significant reductions in both direct patient costs and health care system spending when used instead of colonoscopy.  

[SUMMARIZED CLINICALLY RELVANT POINTS]  
Switching from colonoscopy to FIT provides a more affordable, accessible option that maintains effective early detection of colorectal cancers—thereby alleviating economic stress on individuals and improving equity in screening coverage.  

\boxed{A}
